description: The 'one page, four targets' story phase A5 un-gates: a single test fanned out across desktop and mobile targets by one runOn entry. chrome-on-ios is an unsupported pair, so the ios context SKIPs on the support matrix (that permutation is itself part of the story); windows/mac run desktop Chrome where the host matches; android runs device Chrome on capable (KVM) legs and SKIPs elsewhere. This spec uses a public, static page (example.com) because one URL must be reachable from both the host browser and the emulator (the emulator can't see the host's localhost without the 10.0.2.2 alias); it's isolated in its own spec so any external-network flake is contained.
